## Source: ghsa-malware (a57dc2ba973c0e60b50aa0b26a3478197b84d9adafea9be74a05302250f597f1)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (c1e0b39ca2393b053f31bdaab06ece9ef73680eb15866a4936b52862b42f305c)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-mailreplies-replies' @ 1.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
